target_rows_for_goal_validity_confirmati.analysis_only_note: Correct ids and ranks are evaluation-only facts and cannot be used by action-time evidence generation.
Correct ids and ranks are evaluation-only facts and cannot be used by action-time evidence generation.

excluded_rows_backend_pool_validity_bran.analysis_only_note: This row is not eligible for goal-validity confirmation because the diagnostic label join finds no valid candidate in the deeper pool.

problem_statement.fact: Deeper backend generation with the fixed spatial_nms_p90_k100_d5_v1 variant is structurally valid and recovers valid candidates on two of three previously no-valid rows.
problem_statement.agent_inference: Goal-validity confirmation is interpretable only on recovered rows. Applying the same evidence objective to the still-no-valid row would mix candidate-pool failure with ObjectNav goal-validity evidence.
problem_statement.paper_constraint: This contract freezes a diagnostic handoff. It does not permit terminal ObjectNav commits, first_eval reruns, policy-scale comparison, or paper claims.

candidate_evidence_scope.reason: Use the full fixed deeper pool for the two-row diagnostic so action-time candidate selection is not tuned to post-hoc correct ranks.
candidate_evidence_scope.paper_claim_limitation: A paper-facing method must later replace this diagnostic scope with a predeclared non-GT pool-validity proxy, a fixed evidence budget, or an all-row backend generation policy.

allowed_action_inputs: deeper generation action rows with deeper_generation_status == generated_deeper_backend_pool
deeper generated candidate ids, ranks, scores, semantic scores, support scores, positive support, positions, visit positions, reachability, finite-position metadata, and backend lineage
Habitat navmesh and standoff/reachability checks computed without GT target labels
detector/SAM2 observation evidence computed from rendered frames without GT target labels
duplicate, spatial diversity, candidate count, and backend config metadata
forbidden_action_inputs: choosing candidate evidence targets after inspecting candidate correctness
terminal commit or goal switch based on this diagnostic contract

handoff_accounting: report recovered goal-validity request rows separately from backend/pool-validity branch rows
report target scene/query keys and request ids for both branches
report candidate count, finite-position count, reachable/standoff count, duplicate count, and retained-from-top20 versus new-beyond-top20 counts per request
action_evidence_separation: write request and evidence rows before joining labels
keep evaluation-only correct ids/ranks out of request/evidence rows
report action evidence forbidden key count
join labels only in evaluated rows or summary
goal_validity_evidence: report own-view and cross-view evidence separately
report whether evidence is object/category visibility only or candidate-specific goal evidence
do not treat detector-visible category as ObjectNav goal validity
excluded_branch_accounting: report still-no-valid rows as backend/pool-validity branch rows
do not generate terminal goal-validity decisions for still-no-valid rows
record the next branch as non-GT pool-validity proxy or fallback backend variant

expected_next_analyzer_or_job.name: expanded_retrieval_goal_validity_confirmation_v1
expected_next_analyzer_or_job.role: build request/evidence rows for the two recovered deeper backend rows and write the remaining no-valid row to a backend/pool-validity branch
expected_next_analyzer_or_job.input_scope: three rows from h001_expanded_retrieval_deeper_backend_generation_v1; action-time request generation must use only label-free deeper generation rows

promotion_rules.contract_only: Freezing this contract permits a diagnostic goal-validity confirmation evidence analyzer, not terminal ObjectNav commitment.
promotion_rules.goal_validity_evidence_ready: A later analyzer must show candidate-specific evidence on recovered rows without wrong/no-valid commits before terminal utility can be reconsidered.
promotion_rules.still_no_valid_branch_required: rival_identity:13 remains blocked from goal-validity confirmation until a non-GT pool-validity proxy or fallback backend variant produces a valid candidate pool under a predeclared rule.
promotion_rules.paper_claim_blocked: No first_eval rerun, policy-scale comparison, or paper utility claim is allowed from this contract alone.

next_steps: Implement a small analyzer that consumes deeper generation rows and writes two recovered-row goal-validity request rows plus one backend/pool-validity branch row.
Keep request/evidence rows label-free and join evaluation labels only after rows are written.
Define a non-GT pool-validity proxy or fallback backend variant for rival_identity:13.
Do not promote terminal commits until candidate-specific goal-validity evidence passes a fixed gate on a predeclared or fresh source.
